# Data Model: Add Task
<!-- Generated by /speckit.plan                                      -->
<!-- Derived from spec.md Layer 3 + architecture.md                  -->

---

## Domain Entity

### Task

A single actionable item the user wants to track.

**States:** `active` → `completed` (one-way, set by feature 002).

**Conceptual fields** (from spec.md Layer 3):
| Field | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `id` | Stable UUID assigned at creation, never changes |
| `title` | Free-text description the user typed |
| `completed` | `false` = active, `true` = done |
| `createdAt` | Timestamp of when the task was first saved |
| `updatedAt` | Timestamp of the last change |

---

## TypeScript Types

### Task (runtime type used by all components)

```typescript
interface Task {
  id: string;           // uuid v4
  title: string;        // user-supplied, trimmed
  completed: boolean;   // default false
  createdAt: number;    // Date.now() unix ms
  updatedAt: number;    // Date.now() unix ms
}
```

### TaskInput (component state, not persisted)

```typescript
// Local useState<string> in app/index.tsx
// No separate type needed — just a string.
```

### Actions (for useReducer)

```typescript
type TaskAction =
  | { type: 'ADD_TASK'; title: string }
  | { type: 'TOGGLE_TASK'; id: string }
  | { type: 'DELETE_TASK'; id: string }
  | { type: 'SET_FILTER'; filter: 'all' | 'active' | 'completed' }
  | { type: 'SET_TASKS'; tasks: Task[] };  // initial load from DB
```

### Reducer State

```typescript
interface TaskState {
  tasks: Task[];          // currently displayed (after filter)
  allTasks: Task[];       // unfiltered master list
  filter: 'all' | 'active' | 'completed';
  activeCount: number;
}
```

---

## SQL Schema

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id         TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  title      TEXT    NOT NULL,
  completed  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- 0=false, 1=true
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_created_at ON tasks(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_completed ON tasks(completed);
```

### Queries Used

| Operation | SQL |
|---|---|
| Insert task | `INSERT INTO tasks (id, title, completed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 0, ?, ?)` |
| Get all tasks | `SELECT * FROM tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC` |
| Get active tasks | `SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE completed = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC` |
| Get completed tasks | `SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE completed = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC` |
| Get active count | `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE completed = 0` |

---

## State Transitions

```
[System Start]
    │
    ▼
Load all tasks from SQLite → SET_TASKS
    │
    ▼
[User types + taps add]
    │
    ▼
ADD_TASK → db.insertTask() → state.allTasks.unshift(newTask)
                               state.tasks re-filtered
                               state.activeCount++
    │
    ▼
Input clears, UI re-renders
```
